artPrompt: The chaotic moment the poisoned marina water erupts as mutant fish and clawed shapes thrash up through churning green foam toward the viewer in extreme foreshortening, chum and froth flying. Rusted dock pilings and a crumbling treatment plant loom behind under a bruised stormy sky, sickly bioluminescence glowing beneath the surface, a violent feeding frenzy in full kinetic motion, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Feeding Frenzy at the Marina
text: Each opponent flips a coin. Each creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of coins flipped this way plus the number of dice and coins any player has rolled or flipped this turn. Then all your creatures with a sludge counter gain trample. Chum's in the water and the water answered.
flavorText: Boat Days festival, year forty. Attendance: thousands. Survivors: fewer.
